title: E-commerce Chatbot
scenario: Develop a chatbot persona for an e-commerce store that specializes in gaming accessories. The target audience is gamers aged 18-35. Create a character that would resonate with this demographic and provide product recommendations, support, and advice. Ensure the persona is 120 words or less.
constraints: Use a tone that resonates with gamers aged 18-35

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a tone that resonates with gamers aged 18-35?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
